title: Protocol for Removing ssDNA from dsDNA or RNA Samples
author: New England Biolabs
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7ryhm7w

steps.title: Prepare a 20 µL reaction as follows
steps.instruction: Prepare a 20 µL reaction as follows: %s %s *Most PCR buffers are compatible. **No reaction buffer is necessary if enzyme is added to a PCR reaction. ***Scale larger reaction volumes proportionally.

steps.title: Stop reaction by heat-inactivation at 80 °C for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Stop reaction by heat-inactivation at 80 °C for 00:01:00 .
